posts.caption: a danish classic with hygge twist🤎

as always, our non-milk based coffee takes a new character every few weeks!

after Colombia Huver Castillo, we're heading to the slopes of Uganda's Rwenzori Mountains.

This naturally processed coffee brings notes of tropical fruit, ripe peach, and a caramel-like sweetness that reminds us of caramel ice cream🍨

come discover this month's cup!

you know where to find us tomorrow from 09.00!🤩

time to say goodbye to Indonesia Sadayana. as always, our beans for non-milk based coffees take a new direction approximately every month!

this month: Colombia Huver Castillo! more fruit forward, a little jammy, with a soft funk!🕺🏻playful, expressive, and still beautifully balanced!🍓

let's gooooo!!
cozy enough to stay, beautiful enough to capture.

and tomorrow from 11.00 to 17.00

see you!🤎
